hero.description: Darya Bogdashkina — professional civil law attorney. Solving complex cases involving divorce, alimony and property division since 2014.
hero.img_alt: Attorney Darya Bogdashkina - civil law specialist in Kyiv

situation.title: If this sounds like you —
situation.title_italic: you've come to the right place.
situation.description: We understand the complexity of each situation and know how to help in the most challenging cases.

items.quote: My ex hasn't paid alimony in three months.
items.description: We'll help you recover the arrears and establish enforcement without your participation in court proceedings.

items.quote: I'm afraid I'll lose the apartment in the divorce.
items.description: We'll analyze the sources of acquisition, prepare evidence, and protect what legally belongs to you.

items.quote: I have no idea where to start — I'm lost in the terminology.
items.description: At the first consultation, we'll explain everything in plain language and create a clear 3-step plan forward.

services.title: What I
services.description: Deep expertise in civil law, based on {{years}} years of practice and hundreds of successful cases.
services.cta_desc: Describe your problem, and we will help.

divorce.name: Marriage and Divorce
divorce.desc: Professional support for marriage dissolution. Assistance in court and out-of-court settlements.
details: Consultations on divorce procedures
Preparation of divorce claims
Representation in court without client presence
Marriage annulment
Establishment of separate residence regime

alimony.name: Alimony
alimony.desc: Protection of child rights and ensuring financial well-being. Collection and review of payments.
details: Collection of alimony in fixed amount or share of income
Collection of additional expenses for the child
Reduction or increase of alimony amount
Spousal support collection
Enforcement of alimony payment responsibility

property.name: Property Division
property.desc: Fair distribution of jointly acquired marital property, protection of rights to housing and business.
details: Division of real estate (apartments, houses, land plots)
Division of vehicles and shared business
Disputes over joint credit obligations and debts
Recognition of property as personal private property
Execution of property division agreements

children.name: Custody and Children
children.desc: Solving complex issues of child upbringing and residence with their best interests in mind.
details: Determination of child's place of residence
Establishment of communication and upbringing schedule
Deprivation and restoration of parental rights
Obtaining permission for child's travel abroad
Removal of obstacles in communication with the child

inheritance.name: Inheritance
inheritance.desc: Legal assistance in heritage registration and resolution of inheritance disputes in court.
details: Registration of inheritance by law and by will
Restoration of terms for inheritance acceptance
Recognition of ownership through inheritance
Contesting wills in court
Determination of additional term for inheritance application

domestic_violence.name: Domestic Violence
domestic_violence.desc: Urgent legal protection for victims of domestic violence. Obtaining protection orders.
details: Obtaining a restrictive order against the offender
Defense in administrative offense cases
Representation in police and law enforcement
Legal support for responsibility procedures

housing.name: Housing Disputes
housing.desc: Protection of rights to use housing, resolution of registration and eviction conflicts.
details: Eviction or move-in to housing premises
Recognition of a person as having lost the right to use housing
Disputes over the procedure for using housing premises
Removal of obstacles to the use of property

adoption.name: Adoption
adoption.desc: Full support for the adoption process. Help in preparing documents for guardianship authorities.
details: Legal consultations on adoption issues
Preparation of document package for court submission
Representation in guardianship and trusteeship authorities
Child adoption by one spouse (stepparent)

property_rights.name: Property Rights
property_rights.desc: Protection and registration of ownership rights for real estate and other valuable property.
details: Protection of ownership rights in court
Recognition of ownership for new buildings and unauthorized construction
Registration of real estate documents
Support for real estate transactions

about.title: An attorney you can trust
about.p1: I am Darya Oleksandrivna Bogdashkina, an attorney with {{years}} years of experience in civil law. My approach is based not only on dry legislation but also on empathy.
about.p2: I understand that civil disputes are always an emotional trial. Each client receives my personal attention and honest assessment of the situation.
about.p3: I don't strive to take on hundreds of cases at once. My philosophy is a deep immersion into each separate story to find a solution that protects your interests to the maximum.

items.name: First Call
items.desc: 30 minutes on Zoom or in the office. Free of charge. You explain the situation — I tell you what to do with it.

items.name: Strategy
items.desc: Written legal position with realistic scenarios, deadlines, and budget. No surprises.

items.name: Documents
items.desc: I prepare the claim, evidence, motions. You sign. I file and conduct the case further.

items.name: Court & Execution
items.desc: Representation at all hearings. Control of the decision enforcement until the actual result.

items.name: Olena Savchenko
items.text: Asked for help in an alimony case. The result exceeded expectations — decision in 2 hearings. Extremely grateful for clarity and support.

items.name: Mykhailo Tkachenko
items.text: Divorce with property division went much smoother than I expected. Darya Oleksandrivna is a true professional who knows how to protect the client's interests.

items.name: Iryna Kovalenko
items.text: Fought for child custody. Darya Oleksandrivna was available almost 24/7. Her confidence in court gave me strength. Positive result!

pricing.title: No "buts"
pricing.description: Professional support, transparent pricing and fixed cost — no surprises. For complex cases, we offer individual packages.

consultation.title: 30 minutes of conversation
consultation.description: Personal legal assessment. We analyze your situation, explain everything in plain language, and outline the next steps. No obligations.

features.title: Video Meeting
features.desc: Zoom or Teams, choose your time

features.title: Guaranteed Result
features.desc: Clear plan and next steps defined

items.q: How much does the first consultation cost?
items.a: The first consultation is free. During it, we get to know each other, I analyze your situation and propose a defense strategy. No obligations after the first conversation.

items.q: How quickly can an appointment be scheduled?
items.a: An appointment (offline or online) is usually scheduled within 24 hours of contact. In urgent situations — within a few hours.

items.q: Is my presence mandatory at hearings?
items.a: In most cases (divorce, property division), I can represent your interests entirely independently. Your presence is not mandatory if we issue appropriate representation.

items.q: How long does a divorce process take?
items.a: Through the registry office — 1 month. Through court — from 2 to 6 months, depending on disputes regarding children or property. I always try to speed up the process as much as possible.

contacts.title: Tell me about
contacts.description: The first consultation is free and confidential. Choose a convenient way to contact or fill out the form — I will respond within 24 hours.
